text: Hi everyone and welcome to the Java placement course. Today's video will be about our first exercise. We have given you 10 questions. The entire PDF link is in the description box. We have just studied fundamental concepts. After this we will talk about time and space complexity. Before we do that, all the fundamental topics should be very good. We need to practice all these questions. We have been able to practice all these concepts. We have given you 10 questions. If you see 8 questions, we have discussed all these 8 questions. The last 2 questions are bonus questions. We have not given you a new logic use. We have not discussed this in any lecture. We have discussed the greatest common divisor and fibonacci series. These are the 2 questions. If you ask your placement, you will find a variation. These 2 questions should be tried. The answers to all these questions are in the next lecture. We will provide the next lecture with the next PDF. You can scale the codes and run the code. You can see how much similarity you can get in the code. I hope you solve these problems in exercise. See you in the next video. Till then keep learning and keep practicing your exercises.
